channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Suno's $5.4 billion valuation says about the future of AI and music—and what remains uncertain
item.description: From birthday songs to hospice tributes, Suno finds real-world uses for AI music. Whether it becomes sustainable remains uncertain.

item.title: SpaceX and Anthropic are about to go public—and your 401(k) may be forced to buy in
item.description: Experts warn that dot-com guardrails are being dismantled as SpaceX and Anthropic go public, potentially affecting retirement accounts.

item.title: World's largest sovereign wealth fund backs push for Google oversight on government use of its AI and cloud technology
item.description: A coalition of investors managing $1.15 trillion is pressing Alphabet to explain how it monitors government use of its cloud and AI services.

item.title: AI is primarily a blue state issue, and Democrats face the greatest risk from growing voter backlash
item.description: Workers exposed to AI are concentrated in Democratic strongholds and swing states, presenting either a major opportunity or a significant threat for the party in the midterms.
